mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RCMMD_ARTIST SET DISP_STD_END_DT = now() WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND now() BETWEEN DISP_STD_START_DT AND DISP_STD_END_DT

INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST (CHARACTER_NO, DISP_STD_START_DT, DISP_STD_END_DT, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, CREATE_STD_DTIME, DEL_TARGET_YN) VALUES (#{recommendArtistDto.characterNo}, now(), addtime(adddate(curdate(), - weekday(curdate()) + 6), '23:59:59'), #{recommendArtistDto.dispSn}, now(), now(), 'Y')
INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST_LIST (rcmmd_artist_id, artist_id, artist_type, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdArtistId}, #{artistId}, #{artistType}, #{dispSn})
INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST_TRACK_LIST (rcmmd_artist_id, track_id, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdArtistId}, #{trackId}, #{dispSn})

INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK (CHARACTER_NO, DISP_STD_START_DT, DISP_STD_END_DT, SVC_GENRE_ID, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, CREATE_STD_DTIME, DEL_TARGET_YN) VALUES (#{similarTrack.characterNo}, now(), date_add(CURDATE(), interval 24*60*60 - 1 second), #{similarTrack.svcGenreId}, #{similarTrack.dispSn}, now(), now(), 'Y')
UPDATE TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK SET DISP_STD_END_DT = now() WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND now() BETWEEN DISP_STD_START_DT AND DISP_STD_END_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK_LIST (rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id, track_id, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdPreferGenreSimilarTrackId}, #{trackId}, #{dispSn})
